name: Selective Valid Facilities Batch Export
description:
The state portal is closing for maintenance, and you must batch-export the facilities that are 100% complete. 

1) Open EPA Tier2 Submit 2025.
2) Import the facility database from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\5_facilities_database.t2s (File > Import).
3) Run the Check Data / Validation tool across all facilities to identify which ones have errors.
4) Navigate to the Export tool (File > Export > Tier2 Submit File).
5) Select and export ONLY the facilities with zero (0) validation errors. Uncheck the ones that fail validation.
6) Save the exported batch file to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\ready_submissions.t2s.

Do not attempt to fix the errors in the invalid facilities.
